lay on hands.name: Lay on Hands
lay on hands.description: You have a pool of healing power that replenishes on a long rest. As an action, touch a creature and draw from the pool to restore HP. Spend 5 points from the pool to cure one disease or neutralize one poison.
lay on hands.effect: Heal from pool of 5 × paladin level HP; cure disease/poison for 5 HP
lay on hands.limitations: Touch range, pool depletes, long rest to refill

divine sense.name: Divine Sense
divine sense.description: As an action, you can detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 feet that aren't behind total cover. You know the type but not identity. Also detects consecrated or desecrated ground.
divine sense.effect: Detect celestials, fiends, undead within 60 ft
divine sense.limitations: 1 + CHA mod uses per long rest, action to use, 60 ft range

divine smite.name: Divine Smite
divine smite.description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can expend a spell slot to deal extra radiant damage. The damage increases by 1d8 per slot level, plus 1d8 extra against undead/fiends.
divine smite.effect: 2d8 radiant damage (1st slot) + 1d8 per higher slot level
divine smite.limitations: Melee only, costs spell slot, max 5d8 extra damage

second wind.name: Second Wind
second wind.description: You have a limited well of stamina you can draw on to protect yourself. As a bonus action, regain hit points equal to 1d10 plus your fighter level.
second wind.effect: Heal 1d10 + fighter level HP as bonus action
second wind.limitations: Once per short or long rest

action surge.name: Action Surge
action surge.description: You can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment. Take one additional action on top of your regular action and any bonus action.
action surge.limitations: Once per short or long rest, no extra bonus action

fighting style.name: Fighting Style
fighting style.description: A specialized combat technique. Archery: +2 ranged attacks. Defense: +1 AC. Dueling: +2 damage one-handed. Great Weapon: reroll 1s/2s on damage. Two-Weapon: add mod to off-hand.
fighting style.effect: Permanent combat bonus (varies by style chosen)
fighting style.limitations: Choose one style, cannot take the same style twice

wild shape.name: Wild Shape
wild shape.description: As an action, magically assume the shape of a beast you have seen before. You gain the beast's HP, physical stats, and natural abilities. You can't cast spells while transformed.
wild shape.effect: Transform into beast (CR 1/4 at level 2, CR 1/2 at level 4)
wild shape.limitations: 2 uses per short rest, 1 hour duration, no spellcasting, no flying/swimming at low levels

bardic inspiration.name: Bardic Inspiration
bardic inspiration.description: As a bonus action, choose a creature within 60 ft that can hear you. It gains a Bardic Inspiration die (d6). Within 10 minutes, it can add the die to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw.
bardic inspiration.effect: Grant d6 to add to one check, attack, or save
bardic inspiration.limitations: CHA mod uses per long rest, 60 ft range, 10 min duration

jack of all trades.name: Jack of All Trades
jack of all trades.description: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check you make that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus. Applies to initiative rolls too.
jack of all trades.effect: +1 to all non-proficient ability checks (at level 2-4)

song of rest.name: Song of Rest
song of rest.description: During a short rest, if you or any friendly creature who can hear your performance regains HP by spending Hit Dice, each gains an extra 1d6 HP.
song of rest.effect: +1d6 HP when spending Hit Dice during short rest
song of rest.limitations: Short rest only, creatures must hear you

expertise.name: Expertise
expertise.description: Choose two skills you're proficient in. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check using those skills. Effectively makes you exceptional at your best skills.
expertise.effect: Double proficiency bonus on 2 chosen skills
expertise.limitations: Must already be proficient, choose at levels 1 and 10

favored enemy.name: Favored Enemy
favored enemy.description: Choose a type of favored enemy: beasts, fey, humanoids, undead, etc. You have advantage on Survival checks to track them and Intelligence checks to recall info about them.
favored enemy.effect: Advantage on tracking and knowledge checks vs. chosen enemy type
favored enemy.limitations: Choose one type (two humanoid races), learn one of their languages

natural explorer.name: Natural Explorer
natural explorer.description: Choose a favored terrain: forest, mountain, swamp, etc. When traveling in that terrain, you gain benefits: difficult terrain doesn't slow your group, you can't become lost, you remain alert to danger even while foraging.
natural explorer.effect: Travel and survival bonuses in chosen terrain
natural explorer.limitations: Choose one terrain type, benefits only apply there

primeval awareness.name: Primeval Awareness
primeval awareness.description: Expend a spell slot to sense whether aberrations, celestials, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead are present within 1 mile (6 miles in favored terrain).
primeval awareness.limitations: Costs a spell slot, 1 action per minute of concentration, no pinpoint location

rage.name: Rage
rage.description: Enter a battle fury as a bonus action. While raging, you gain bonus damage on STR-based melee attacks, advantage on STR checks and saves, and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.
rage.effect: +2 melee damage, advantage on STR, resistance to physical damage
rage.limitations: 1 minute, can't cast spells, ends if you don't attack or take damage, limited uses per long rest

sneak attack.name: Sneak Attack
sneak attack.description: Once per turn, deal extra damage when you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon and have advantage on the attack roll, or when an ally is within 5 ft of the target.
sneak attack.effect: +1d6 damage at level 1 (increases by 1d6 every 2 levels)
sneak attack.limitations: Once per turn, need advantage or adjacent ally, finesse/ranged weapon only
